raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX I placed an order for XXXX XXXX, the next day on XX/XX/year> I realized I put the wrong address. So I called in the morning with the merchant to cancel the order or change the shipping address. They said it was too late to cancel and they couldnt change the shipping address. I would had to contact XXXX to intercept it. Next thing you know the package has arrived at the wrong address. I work in sales, so I couldnt check in with XXXX  to intercept it. I tried phone call and chat support, none were helpful. I then dispute with my credit card company Citi Bank, they just closed the case and is denied my dispute. Even though they have documents that shows a different person belonging to that shipped address. Now Im charged for a product that I never received. I dont even live in that address and you will see in the attached documents.
